description.overview: The Norwich Terrier has pricked ears (unlike the folded-ear Norfolk) and was bred to hunt vermin.
description.temperament: Norwich are alert, curious, and affectionate. They're spirited but generally good-natured.
description.health: Generally healthy. May be prone to upper airway syndrome and hip dysplasia.
description.exercise: Moderate energy. Need daily walks and mental stimulation.

best_for: Those wanting a small, spirited dog
verdict.summary: Small but mighty terriers with pricked ears. Norwich are curious, affectionate, and adapt well to various living situations.
